title: Sub-app registration
description: Per-rig registration consumed by core/scripts/launcher/scripts/launch.sh. See ADR-0058 (decisions/adr/0058-sub-app-registration-schema.md).

schema_version.description: Pinned. Schema-breaking changes require a new ADR and version bump.

id.description: Kebab-case rig identifier. Used in tmux window names. May or may not equal the rig's BEAD_PREFIX_MAP key — see bead_prefix.

bead_prefix.description: Optional. Bead prefix for AgentBead routing (e.g. 'gt' for gastown-pilot, 'cv' for cv-builder). Defaults to id when omitted. Must match a key in BEAD_PREFIX_MAP at core/packages/workflows/src/types/bead.ts:95-105 or an ADR-0052 reservation.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the rig's local checkout. Validator confirms the directory exists at launch time.

priority_tier.description: Drives default visual status (ADR-0059) and launch order. infrastructure starts grey; active starts cyan; dormant registers but does not launch unless --include-dormant.

rig_profile.description: Per ADR-0051. frame rigs follow Frame conventions (MF, Carbon, frame-agent). non-frame rigs deliberately diverge.

order.description: Sort within tmux window list. Lower numbers come first.

key_binding.description: Optional. tmux prefix-key chord to attach an interactive Claude session in a new pane.

pre_launch.description: Optional shell command run once before any panes start. Use for one-shot setup; do not use for long-running processes.

size.description: Percentage of the parent split. Sums of sibling sizes should approach 100%.

split.description: How this pane splits relative to the previous pane. Ignored for the first pane.
